name: bitwise_or_expression
description: Code should include a bitwise OR expression between two multi-bit vectors
snippet:
logic [3:0] a, b, y;
assign y = a | b;

name: bitwise_xor_expression
description: Code should include a bitwise XOR expression between two multi-bit vectors
snippet:
logic [3:0] a, b, z;
assign z = a ^ b;

name: majority_function_three_input
description: Code should include a three-input majority function that returns true when two or more inputs are true
snippet:
logic a, b, c, maj;
assign maj = (a & b) | (b & c) | (a & c);

name: variadic_majority_reduction
description: Code should include a majority reduction over an odd number of boolean inputs using sum comparison
